description: Your marine routing agency requires an updated climatology of the Indian Ocean summer monsoon pressure gradient to calibrate heavy weather avoidance models for the Suez-to-Singapore route. Following the mandate in ~/Desktop/routing_climatology_mandate.txt, use Panoply and the Sea Level Pressure data in ~/PanoplyData/ to map the July pressure field, identify the Mascarene High and Asian/Monsoon Low, and compute the cross-equatorial pressure gradient. Save the plot and structured report to ~/Documents/MaritimeRouting/.
